description: Approved field-layout golden reference templates for Yeeflow Approval form submission and task pages. These templates are used inside Approval Form Layouts v1.1 section_content_area slots to display approval form fields in responsive Grid layouts.

allowedEditableAreas: Column count and column sizing metadata on form_grid_fields_2col_wrapper or nested field-group grids
Column span on field controls and grouping containers, bounded by the parent Grid column count
Dynamic display rules on grouped Container/Grid controls
Custom validation and action properties on supported approval form field controls
lockedAreas: Root wrapper identity and control type
templates.appPlanUse: Select approval_form_fields_grid_2col_v1_1 when an Approval form field group should use the standard two-column desktop layout. The App Plan should describe group purpose, fields included, desktop/tablet/mobile column counts, full-row field controls, and dynamic-display grouping needs without generated runtime IDs or copied JSON.

allowedEditableAreas: Column count and column sizing metadata on form_grid_fields_3col_wrapper or nested field-group grids
Column span on field controls and grouping containers, bounded by the parent Grid column count
Dynamic display rules on grouped Container/Grid controls
Custom validation and action properties on supported approval form field controls
lockedAreas: Root wrapper identity and control type
templates.appPlanUse: Select approval_form_fields_grid_3col_v1_1 when an Approval form field group benefits from a denser three-column desktop layout. Tablet columns must not exceed desktop columns and mobile must collapse to one column.

rules.fieldMargin: Every generated Approval form field control inside an approved field-grid wrapper must set margin to zero.
rules.fieldNavLabel: Every generated Approval form field control inside an approved field-grid wrapper must have a business-specific nv_label/nav_label derived from the Approval form field or grouped field purpose.
rules.fullRowControls: Multiple line, Rich text, and Sub list controls must span the full parent Grid width on every responsive breakpoint.
rules.gridCellContent: A Grid cell may contain one direct control. When multiple controls are needed in one cell, place a Container or nested Grid in that cell and put the controls inside it.
rules.responsiveColumns: PC/laptop columns should be 2 or 3, tablet columns must not exceed PC/laptop columns, and mobile columns should be 1.
rules.placement: When used inside approval-form-layouts-v1.1, approval form field-grid wrappers must be placed only inside content_card_wrapper > section_content_area.
